_description: Weave construction types with efficiency factors

LE.name: Half Leno Weave (Gauze)
LE.description: Two warp systems (osnova 1 & 2) twisting around weft, standard geogrid construction
LE.notes: Good balance of strength and openness

LE2.name: Half Leno Weave Version 2
LE2.description: Modified leno with binding thread (provezujuća nit)
LE2.notes: Binding thread adds stability but not strength

DLE.name: Double Leno Weave
DLE.description: More complex interlocking pattern with two warp systems
DLE.notes: Higher efficiency due to better load transfer at junctions

PLE.name: Plain + Leno Weave
PLE.description: Hybrid construction with plain weave sections and leno binding
PLE.notes: Combines stability of plain weave with openness of leno

PLAIN.name: Plain Weave
PLAIN.notes: Lower efficiency due to crimp, but very stable
